{"name":"3dcd04ba6ab904a93c03","layouts":[{"id":0,"position":{"x":854.0192926045015,"y":244.88745980707395,"z":4000,"width":362.18649517684884,"height":222.2508038585209,"tabOrder":4000}}],"singleVisual":{"visualType":"tableEx","projections":{"Values":[{"queryRef":"select"},{"queryRef":"select1","hidden":true}]},"prototypeQuery":{"Version":2,"From":[],"Select":[{"NativeVisualCalculation":{"Language":"dax","Expression":"
VAR LatestSupplyYear = MAXX(Supply_Years, Supply_Years[Year])
VAR LatestIndicatorYear = MAXX(Indicator_Years, Indicator_Years[Year])
RETURN
SUMX(
    SUMMARIZE(
        fact_supply_share,
        fact_supply_share[material_key],
        fact_supply_share[country_key], 
        fact_supply_share[stage_key]
    ),
    CALCULATE([Supply Share (0..1)], Supply_Years[Year] = LatestSupplyYear) * 
    (
        [w_Share] * CALCULATE([Supply Share (0..1)], Supply_Years[Year] = LatestSupplyYear) +
        [w_Score] * CALCULATE([Score (Norm)], Indicator_Years[Year] = LatestIndicatorYear) +
        [w_Intensity] * [Intensity (Norm)]
    )
)","Name":"Material Risk Index - Latest"},"Name":"select","NativeReferenceName":"Material Risk Index - Latest"},{"NativeVisualCalculation":{"Language":"dax","Expression":"BLANK()","Name":"Calculation"},"Name":"select1","NativeReferenceName":"Calculation"}]},"autoSelectVisualType":false,"drillFilterOtherVisuals":true}}
